other_observers: Bill Maynard, John Drummond, Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, Brad Steger, Peter Gent, Maggie Boswell, among others; Brian Gibbons and Steve Brown found the bird in their banding net.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, at RMBO Banding Station
description: A warbler with gray hood and complete white eye ring. Light yellow under parts, and long yellow under tail coverts. See photos.Behaviors: A hard to see warbler, that moved slowly or not at all, in dense olives, low to the ground.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
